name: Carrot Raisin Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the flour, oats, baking soda, and cinnamon until well combined.
2. Add the prune butter, honey, grated carrots, and raisins to the dry ingredients. Mix until all ingredients are thoroughly incorporated.
3. Place parchment paper on a baking sheet. Roll the dough into 1-inch balls and space them about 1-1/2 inches apart on the prepared sheet. If the dough is too sticky to handle, chill it in the refrigerator for a few minutes.
4. Using the bottom of a glass dipped in sugar, flatten the cookies to about 1/4 inch thickness.
5. Bake at 275°F (135°C) for approximately 18 minutes, or until golden brown. Allow the cookies to cool on the pan for 1 minute before transferring them to wire racks. Let them cool completely. Serve immediately or store in an airtight container, arranging in single layers separated by sheets of parchment paper.
